zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Baguley II於大約1255年出生在英國英格蘭爾巴可洛福 希爾時，他的父親Sir Ralph de Baguley27歲，母親Roesia de Massey22歲。他於大約1278年與Lady Lucy de Corona在英國爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1320年在英國英格蘭爾斯托普特享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Baguley II于大约1255年出生在英国英格兰爾巴可洛福 希爾时，他的父亲Sir Ralph de Baguley27岁，母亲Roesia de Massey22岁。他于大约1278年与Lady Lucy de Corona在英国爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1320年在英国英格兰爾斯托普特享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Baguley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Baguley (Cheshire). The placename is from Old English bagga denoting an unidentified animal, perhaps the badger, + lēah ‘wood, clearing’. Compare Bagley .

variants.name: Bagley
meanings: English: habitational name from Baguley in Cheshire or from any of several places called Bagley, in Devon, Gloucestershire, Shropshire, Somerset, and Yorkshire. These get their names either from the Old English personal name Bacga + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’ or from an unattested Old English word, bagga, for a ‘bag-shaped’ object or creature + lēah.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Baguley II was born about 1255, in Bucklow Hill, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Ralph de Baguley, was 27 and his mother, Roesia de Massey, was 22. He married Lady Lucy de Corona about 1278, in Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1320, in Stockport, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Baguley II est né environ 1255, à Bucklow Hill, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Ralph de Baguley, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Roesia de Massey, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Lady Lucy de Corona environ 1278, à Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1320, à Stockport, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Baguley II um 1255 in Bucklow Hill, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Ralph de Baguley 27 und seine Mutter Roesia de Massey 22. Er hat um 1278 in Cheshire, England Lady Lucy de Corona geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1320 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Stockport, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Baguley II è nato il circa 1255 nel Bucklow Hill, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Ralph de Baguley, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Roesia de Massey, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Lady Lucy de Corona circa 1278, nel Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1320, nel Stockport, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Baguley IIが約1255年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアブックロウ ヒルで生まれた時，父Sir Ralph de Baguleyは27歳，母Roesia de Masseyは22歳であった。約1278年にイギリスチェシュアイアでLady Lucy de Coronaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1320年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアストクプオルトで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Baguley II(이)가 대략 1255년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 벅로 힐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Ralph de Baguley(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Roesia de Massey(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1278년 영국 체실르에서 Lady Lucy de Corona(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1320년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 스톡포트에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Baguley II nasceu aproximadamente 1255, em Bucklow Hill, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Ralph de Baguley, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Roesia de Massey, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Lucy de Corona aproximadamente 1278, em Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1320, em Stockport, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Baguley II родился около 1255 г. в местности букклоу хилл, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Ralph de Baguley было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Roesia de Massey, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Lucy de Corona около 1278 г. в местности чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1320 г. в местности стоккпорт, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Baguley II nació aproximadamente 1255, en Bucklow Hill, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Ralph de Baguley, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Roesia de Massey, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Lady Lucy de Corona aproximadamente 1278, en Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1320, en Stockport, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 66 años.
